title: T-022 — Site detail 8-tab page (ms_site_detail) — MS-115
prompt:
# T-022 — Site detail 8-tab page

PRD: docs/prd/14-MULTI-SITE-PRD.md §10C MS-115
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/sites-screens.jsx:102-410 (ms_site_detail)
Translation notes: _meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-multi-site.md §ms_site_detail (BL-MS-04 mobile accordion)

## Goal
Server Component page /(multi-site)/sites/[siteId] with 8 tabs (Overview, Config, Inventory Snapshot, Production Snapshot, Users, Transfers, Calendar, Docs) URL-driven via ?tab=. Mobile accordion at <768px (BL-MS-04 fix).

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/[siteId]/page.tsx (RSC) — server-fetches site row + aggregate counts for KPI cards.
2. apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/[siteId]/_components/site-detail-tabs.tsx — shadcn Tabs (URL ?tab=), accordion at <768px via responsive shadcn pattern.
3. Per-tab Server Components: overview/config-tab (links to T-026 override modal)/inventory-snapshot/production-snapshot/users-tab/transfers-tab/calendar-tab/docs-tab.
4. RTL parity test + Playwright trace asserting 8 tabs render + mobile accordion swap + Edit/Clear actions Admin/Site-Manager gated.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/[siteId]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/[siteId]/_components/site-detail-tabs.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/[siteId]/_components/tabs/overview-tab.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/[siteId]/_components/tabs/config-tab.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/[siteId]/_components/tabs/users-tab.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/[siteId]/_components/tabs/transfers-tab.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/[siteId]/_components/__tests__/site-detail-tabs.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/sites-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- AC count consolidated from 7→4 by Fixer F14a 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost) -->
1. Given the page renders, when compared to sites-screens.jsx:102-410 (ms_site_detail), then 8 tabs and per-tab content layout match (Identity card, Status card, Config table, Inventory KPI cards, recent WOs, perm_matrix users, ISTs split inbound/outbound, calendar grid, docs list) — RTL parity + Playwright trace.
2. Given URL ?tab=users, when page renders, then Users tab is active and the URL is preserved across navigation.
3. Given viewport width < 768px, when page renders, then Tabs switch to shadcn Accordion (BL-MS-04 fix); each previously-tab section renders as accordion item.
4. Given Config tab loads, when Edit Override button is clicked, then T-026 site_config_override_modal opens with pre-filled L1 base value.
5. Given user role=warehouse_operator (no admin/site_manager), when page renders, then Edit/Clear/Decommission buttons are NOT rendered (Server Component gate).
6. Given the page is in withSiteContext(siteId=Y) but URL targets siteId=X, when page resolves, then 403 SITE_ACCESS_DENIED (V-MS-16) is returned (route middleware T-007 catches before page renders).

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL parity + URL ?tab= + mobile accordion + Edit Override flow + permission gate + V-MS-16 before page exists.
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run site-detail-tabs' + Playwright site-detail.spec.ts.

## Prototype parity
Reference prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/sites-screens.jsx:102-410 (ms_site_detail).
Implement matching the canonical layout 1:1 per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`. Capture RTL parity snapshot + Playwright trace as closeout evidence.

## Risk red lines
- Do not paste prototype JSX wholesale.
- Do not ignore BL-MS-04 — mobile accordion required.
- Do not let users access /sites/[siteId] for a site not in their site_user_access — V-MS-16 enforced by middleware.
- Do not client-side hide Edit/Clear — Server Component gate.
- Do not load all tab content upfront — lazy-load via Server Component splits.

Given user role=warehouse_operator, when page renders, then Edit/Clear/Decommission NOT rendered (Server Component gate).
Given withSiteContext(siteId=Y) but URL targets siteId=X, when page resolves, then 403 SITE_ACCESS_DENIED (V-MS-16) via middleware T-007.
